mentions.note: Gap +7% comp (on top of prior 7%), Old Navy +3%, Banana Republic +4%; 8 consecutive quarters positive; highest gross margin in 25 years; buy dip after after-hours drop.

CEO took accountability rather than blaming environment; Gap brand executing well but Old Navy seasonal weakness led to soft guidance. Low valuation at 9x earnings with solid dividend offsets turnaround slowdown.
Overall stabilizing but Athleta subsidiary weak link with sales down 12%, same-store sales down 11%. Gap rebuilding brand but this is long turnaround project; need visible progress before adding.
